_README: Copy to thumbnail-brand.json and edit for your app. Paths are relative to the repo root. Placement ratios are fractions of the base image width (cx/x) and height (cy/y/height).
_logo_tint: Recolor a dark logo to this RGB (keeps alpha) so it reads on a dark background. Remove/omit to keep the logo's own colors.
_raw: AI-generated base thumbnail (reserved empty icon + logo zones, no brand marks drawn).
_output_size: Final [w, h]. 1280x720 is the standard 16:9 video thumbnail. null to keep native size.
_cover_boxes: Optional. Paint out unwanted baked-in art (e.g. a DEMO badge). 'box' is [x0,y0,x1,y1] as width/height fractions; the region at that box offset by from_dx_ratio/from_dy_ratio (clean background) is copied over it. Remove if not needed.

icon._comment: App icon placement. cx/cy are the icon CENTER as fractions of width/height.

logo._comment: Company logo placement (bottom-right by default). Scrim = soft dark pill behind the logo for legibility over busy areas.
